---
name: 🌐 PWA App Integration Request
about: Request a new officially supported/pre-configured PWA app
title: '[PWA REQUEST] '
labels: pwa-request
assignees: ''
---

## PWA details
- **App Name:** (e.g. Spotify Web Player)
- **Target PWA URL:** (e.g. https://open.spotify.com)
- **High-Quality PNG Icon URL (Optional):** (e.g. link to a 512x512 png)

## Verification
- [ ] I have tested this URL in the Switch's internal browser or via "Universal Mode" and confirmed that the layout, navigation, and controls work.
- [ ] This website is a Progressive Web App (PWA) or is mobile-friendly.

## Context
Provide any specific configurations needed (e.g. requires user-agent spoofing, specific cookies, or keyboard interaction overrides).
